case_title: CHOW, LAWRENCE VS THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-08-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-20-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO ADD HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION AS DEFENDANT.
PLTFF'S DECLARATION:WAS ADVISED THAT "I DO NOT HAVE TO SERVE AGAIN".
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER "TO ADD A 2ND DEFT": GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY OCEAN VIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $1,594.44 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,679.44, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5,314.80, AND ATTRIBUTES 70% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD, DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY OCEAN VIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,314.80 FILED BY CHOW, LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY OCEAN VIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO JACK GARDENER AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR JOHN STEWART CO.
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO "ADD A 2ND DEFT" FILED;TO FOLDER/TRAY.
